steps.title: Spot the participial phrase requirement
steps.content: An introductory participial phrase like “finding that administrative unit GK13 had a 0.62 ratio of native to non-native trees” must be followed by a complete independent clause with a finite main verb.

steps.title: Choose the finite verb
steps.content: ”Recommended” is a finite verb and correctly forms the main clause: “The researchers recommended efforts to improve the biodiversity...” The others are non-finite verb forms (participles and infinitive) that cannot serve as main verbs. That matches choice A — A is correct.
